CreateLogStoreView.name: Log view name
CreateLogStoreView.logstores: List of log stores associated with the log view
CreateLogStoreView.logstores.region: Region where the log store resides
CreateLogStoreView.logstores.project: Log group name that the log store belongs to
CreateLogStoreView.logstores.name: Name of the log store
CreateLogStoreView.logstores.extends: Allows aliasing index columns in the log store
